result.name: Actuators
result.description: Pneumatic, servo-pneumatic and electromechanical linear drives and semi-rotary drives for factory automation

result.name: Motors and servo drives
result.description: Servo and stepper motors. Motor and multi-axis controllers

result.name: Grippers
result.description: Whether for sturdy gripping in a machine tool or micro-gripping in electronics manufacturing, the range of grippers from Festo covers all kinds of applications.

result.name: Industrial robots
result.description: Pick & place, linear gantries and three-dimensional gantries: the fast route to a multi-axis system with standard handling components from the modular system

result.name: Vacuum technologies
result.description: Complete vacuum range consisting of simple vacuum generators, valves suitable for vacuum, vacuum switches and vacuum grippers and their accessories.

result.name: Valves and valve terminals
result.description: Standard valves and universal valves, application-optimised. Manually and mechanically actuated valves; shut-off, flow control, pressure limiting and proportional valves.

result.name: Motion Terminal
result.description: Flow rate 550 l/min. Voltage 24 V DC. Pressure -0.9 ... 8 bar. Degree of protection IP65. Semi in-line valves. Metal manifold rail. Fieldbus interface via modular electrical terminal type CPX

result.name: Sensors
result.description: Sensors and monitoring devices and their accessories.

result.name: Compressed air preparation
result.description: Service unit combinations and individual devices for compressed air preparation

result.name: Tubes, fittings, plugs and cables
result.description: We offer a wide range of pneumatic and electric connectors.. - Tubing, fittings and distributors for a range of working environments. - Electrical connecting cables and plugs with a variety of connection technology

result.name: Control technology and remote I/O
result.description: Electronic controllers and remote I/O including electrical peripherals for standard and potentially explosive atmospheres.

result.name: Software
result.description: Software and user documentation.

result.name: Function-specific systems
result.description: Function-specific systems always consist of application software, a controller, and selected and suitable hardware. These systems are always associated with a type of joining technology and are highly application-specific.

result.name: Other pneumatic components
result.description: Function-specific systems always consist of user software, a controller as well as selected and suitable hardware. These systems are always designated forjoining technology and are highly application-oriented.

result.name: Services
result.description: Commissioning services for Festo products and solutions on site or remotely. Certified services for saving compressed air and energy

messages.content: Function call: check_sub_category_available with pimId pim227

result.name: Parallel grippers
result.description: Size 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16, 20, 25, 32, 35, 40, 50, 63 mm. Stroke length 0 ... 80 mm. Force 8 ... 770 N per gripper jaw. Grippers with gripper fingers that move a linear direction, independent of the number of gripper fingers (two- and three-point grippers).

result.name: Three finger grippers
result.description: Size 16, 25, 32, 35, 40, 50, 63 mm. Stroke length 2.5 ... 10 mm per gripper jaw. Force 30 ... 864 N per gripper jaw. Grippers with gripper fingers that move a linear direction, independent of the number of gripper fingers (two- and three-point grippers).

result.name: Angular grippers
result.description: Size 8, 10, 12, 16, 20, 25, 32, 40 mm. Opening angle 14 ... 18.5°, 30°, 40°, 180°. Gripping torque 11 ... 965 Ncm. Grippers whose gripper fingers execute a swivelling movement, independent of the angle.

result.name: Radial grippers
result.description: Size 10, 12, 16, 20, 25, 32, 40 mm. Opening angle 180°. Gripping torque 13 ... 600 Ncm.

result.name: Swivel/gripper units
result.description: Size: 12, 16, 20. Stroke length 2.5 ... 7 mm per gripper jaw. Force 26 ... 65 N per gripper jaw. Swivel angle 220°. Combination of semi-rotary drive and gripper.

result.name: Bellows grippers
result.description: Pneumatic grippers for sensitive and secure internal gripping.

result.name: Accessories for grippers
result.description: Adapter kits and installation components for handling units which allow handling systems to be constructed.
